title: fix and update
body:
* 修复 `timeline` 的 bug，关联：https://github.com/pyecharts/pyecharts/issues/2361
* 更新一些配置的引用位置和方式
    * `markline`, `markarea` 增加动画配置项：https://github.com/pyecharts/pyecharts/issues/2362

step_plan.summary: This PR fixes a Timeline mutation bug by snapshotting per-time-point options to isolate configurations, and adds per-mark animation configuration (animation and animationDuration) to MarkLine and MarkArea options for better animation control, while preserving backward compatibility.

steps.operation: Snapshot per-time-point options in Timeline.add to prevent cross-point mutation
steps.reason: Timeline currently reuses mutable option dictionaries when appending time points; this can cause options from one time point to leak into others. Implementing a deep copy/snapshot of the per-time-point options ensures each time point retains an independent configuration, addressing the mutation bug described in issue #2361.
steps.side_effects: Slight increase in memory usage due to deep copies; may require updates to tests that relied on object identity; downstream code should use the copied structures without unintended cross-time-point mutations.

steps.operation: Add per-mark animation configuration to MarkLineOpts to support animations
steps.reason: Expose per-mark animation settings for markLine to support the animation feature described in issue #2362; maintain backward compatibility by introducing new optional fields with default values that replicate current behavior when not provided.
steps.side_effects: Serialization should include new keys when provided; existing users should see no behavior change unless they opt into the new animation fields; tests should validate JSON includes animation fields when set.

steps.operation: Add per-mark animation configuration to MarkAreaOpts to support animations
steps.reason: Expose per-mark animation settings for markArea to support animations in marks as described in issue #2362; maintain backward compatibility with default values when not specified.
steps.side_effects: Serialization should include new keys when provided; potential test updates to verify proper rendering of animation fields in options; ensures consistent behavior with MarkLineOpts changes.
